title: Start competitor scraping and observe live progress indicators
description: Verifies that a user can start scraping from the main page and observe live progress/row counters updating.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill competitor sitemap or store URL(s) into the competitor URL input
Click start scraping and analysis
Wait for live scraping progress indicators to update
Verify live scraping progress and row counters are displayed
Verify scraped products are shown as available for downstream use in the app

title: Resumable scraping run continues after restarting with same URLs
description: Verifies that checkpointing allows a scraping run to resume/continue when started again with the same inputs.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill competitor sitemap or store URL(s) into the competitor URL input
Click start scraping and analysis
Wait for live scraping progress indicators to update
Click start scraping and analysis again with the same competitor URL(s)
Verify the scraping run resumes or continues without starting from an empty state
Verify live scraping progress and row counters continue updating

title: Invalid competitor URL input is blocked or shows validation feedback
description: Verifies that the UI prevents starting scraping with invalid competitor URL input and shows user-facing validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill invalid text into the competitor URL input
Click start scraping and analysis
Verify an input validation error is visible
Verify scraping does not start and no live progress indicators appear

title: Scraping with multiple competitor URLs starts and tracks progress
description: Verifies that the user can provide multiple competitor URLs and the UI still starts scraping and tracks progress.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill multiple competitor sitemap or store URL(s) into the competitor URL input
Click start scraping and analysis
Wait for live scraping progress indicators to update
Verify live scraping progress and row counters are displayed
Verify the app indicates competitor data collection is in progress or available

title: Scraping pipeline primary content loads on the main page
description: Verifies that the main page exposes the competitor scraping inputs and start action.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify competitor sitemap/store URL input controls are displayed
Verify the start scraping and analysis control is available

title: End-to-end price comparison workflow with catalog upload and decision updates
description: Verifies that a user can upload a catalog, run analysis, view grouped results, adjust a decision, and export the final decisions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid catalog CSV that includes a unique identifier column named no
Click the control to run analysis and review sections
Scroll to the grouped results sections
Select a different decision action for one product from the decision controls
Click the control to export decisions
Verify grouped results are displayed for multiple decision categories
Verify the exported decisions reflect the updated decision for the edited product

title: Catalog upload validation: missing required no identifier shows error
description: Verifies that running analysis with a catalog missing the required no column shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a catalog CSV missing the required identifier column no
Click the control to run analysis and review sections
Verify a validation error is visible indicating a required identifier column is missing
Verify grouped results are not produced for export/webhook-ready decisions

title: Grouped result navigation: inspect each decision group after analysis
description: Verifies that after analysis, the user can inspect the main decision groups (higher, lower, approved, missing, review).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid catalog CSV that includes a unique identifier column named no
Click the control to run analysis and review sections
Scroll through the results and open each decision group section
Verify decision group sections are displayed including higher, lower, approved, missing, and review
Verify product rows are displayed within at least one decision group

title: Modify multiple product decisions and verify persistence in UI summary/export
description: Verifies that multiple decision edits are retained and reflected in the final output view/export.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid catalog CSV that includes a unique identifier column named no
Click the control to run analysis and review sections
Select updated decision actions for two different products from the decision controls
Click the control to export decisions
Verify the exported decisions reflect both updated decisions for the edited products
Verify the app shows a confirmation that export output was produced

title: Price comparison primary content loads on main page
description: Verifies that the main page exposes catalog upload, analysis, and decision review controls.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify a catalog CSV upload control is displayed
Verify a control to run analysis and review is available

title: AI review flow: run AI verification for review items and accept reclassification
description: Verifies that the user can trigger AI review for items in the review group and accept AI suggestions to reclassify.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid catalog CSV that includes a unique identifier column named no
Click the control to run analysis and review sections
Scroll to the review items section
Click the control to trigger AI review actions for review items
Wait for AI verification results to appear
Click the control to accept AI suggestions to reclassify selected items
Verify AI verification results are displayed with confidence scores
Verify accepted items are reclassified and reflected in the decision grouping

title: AI reclassification on selected items only
description: Verifies that automatic reclassification can be run for a selected subset of review items and only those items change classification.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid catalog CSV that includes a unique identifier column named no
Click the control to run analysis and review sections
Scroll to the review items section
Select a subset of review items for AI reclassification
Click the control to run automatic reclassification for selected items
Verify AI verification results are displayed for the selected items
Verify only the selected items change classification in the displayed results

title: AI chat utility opens and returns a response for a product inquiry
description: Verifies that the AI chat/interaction utility can be used to ask about a product and a response is displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid catalog CSV that includes a unique identifier column named no
Click the control to run analysis and review sections
Scroll to the AI chat or AI utilities section
Fill a product-related question into the AI chat input
Submit the AI chat question
Verify an AI chat response is displayed
Verify the response is associated with the submitted question context

title: AI utilities are discoverable on the main page after analysis
description: Verifies that AI verification/deep analysis controls become available in the UI once results exist to review.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid catalog CSV that includes a unique identifier column named no
Click the control to run analysis and review sections
Verify AI review and deep analysis controls are displayed
Verify the review group section is available for AI-assisted actions
